Registration.title: Registration
Registration.description: A registration for the UWL Alumni Networking event.

studentName.description: The full name of the student.

contactNumber.description: The contact number of the student.

program.description: The program the student is enrolled in.

uwlIdNo.description: The UWL ID number of the student.

interested.description: Whether the student is interested in attending.

informAdvance.description: Agreement to inform in advance if unable to attend.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the registration was created.
